name: Chocolate Horse Muffins, (Chocolate Horse Res
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all bran, bran cereal, salt, boiling water and buttermilk in a large bowl. Let stand until lukewarm.
2. In another bowl, cream the shortening and sugar. Add eggs one at a time, stirring after each addition. Stir in the flour and baking soda until just combined.
3. Gently fold the bran mixture into the wet ingredients. Do not overmix.
4. Spoon batter evenly into a greased 12-cup muffin tin. Bake for 20 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
5. Cool in the pan on a wire rack for 5 minutes before removing to cool completely.
Hints:
Add grated carrots, nuts, apples, spices, oranges, raisins or dates as desired.
